# 2026-01-24 21:53:20Z

<!-- VS Code Copilot IDE Session 849dcb8c-081b-4ab3-b458-f683a92ace11 (2026-01-24 21:53:20Z) -->

_**User (2026-01-24 21:53:20Z)**_

When I am adding items to the order (cart) I need a simple option to add specified number of items. Especially useful for when somebody is buying more shots to friends. What would you suggest?

---

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

For adding multiple items at once in your POS system, I'd suggest adding a **quantity selector** that appears when adding items to the cart. Here are a few approaches:

## Option 1: Quick Quantity Buttons (Recommended)

Add small quantity buttons (1, 2, 3, 4, 5+) that appear when hovering/clicking on a product card:

````elixir
<!-- filepath: lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pos_live.html.heex -->
<!-- Product card with quick quantity selector -->
<div class="card bg-white shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow">
  <div class="card-body p-4">
    <!-- Product info -->
    <h3 class="card-title text-lg">{product.name}</h3>
    <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">{product.category.name}</p>
    
    <!-- Quick quantity selector -->
    <div class="flex gap-2 mt-2">
      <button :for={qty <- [1, 2, 3, 4]}
              phx-click="add_item" 
              phx-value-product-id={product.id}
              phx-value-quantity={qty}
              class="btn btn-sm btn-outline flex-1">
        {qty}x
      </button>
      <button phx-click="show_custom_quantity" 
              phx-value-product-id={product.id}
              class="btn btn-sm btn-outline">
        5+
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
````

## Option 2: Modal with Number Input

For "5+" or custom quantities, show a modal:

````elixir
<!-- filepath: lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pos_live.html.heex -->
<!-- Custom quantity modal -->
<div :if={@show_quantity_modal} class="modal modal-open">
  <div class="modal-box">
    <h3 class="font-bold text-lg">How many?</h3>
    <p class="py-4">{@selected_product.name}</p>
    
    <.form for={@quantity_form} phx-submit="add_multiple_items">
      <.input 
        field={@quantity_form[:quantity]} 
        type="number" 
        label="Quantity" 
        min="1"
        max="99"
        autofocus
      />
      
      <div class="modal-action">
        <button type="button" 
                phx-click="cancel_quantity" 
                class="btn btn-ghost">
          Cancel
        </button>
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
          Add Items
        </button>
      </div>
    </.form>
  </div>
</div>
````

## Option 3: Increment/Decrement in Cart

Add +/- buttons directly in the cart for already added items:

````elixir
<!-- filepath: lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pos_live.html.heex -->
<!-- Cart item with quantity controls -->
<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
  <span class="flex-1">{item.product.name}</span>
  
  <!-- Quantity controls -->
  <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
    <button phx-click="decrease_quantity" 
            phx-value-item-id={item.id}
            class="btn btn-xs btn-circle btn-ghost">
      −
    </button>
    
    <span class="font-bold min-w-[2rem] text-center">
      {item.quantity}
    </span>
    
    <button phx-click="increase_quantity" 
            phx-value-item-id={item.id}
            class="btn btn-xs btn-circle btn-ghost">
      +
    </button>
  </div>
  
  <span class="font-bold w-20 text-right">
    <CurrencyHelper.format_currency(item.quantity * item.unit_price) />
  </span>
</div>
````

## My Recommendation

**Combine Option 1 + Option 3**: 
- Quick quantity buttons (1-4) on product cards for common scenarios
- "5+" button that opens a modal for custom quantities
- +/- buttons in the cart to adjust quantities after adding

This gives you:
- ⚡ **Speed** for common cases (shots for 2-4 people)
- 🎯 **Precision** for larger quantities
- 🔄 **Flexibility** to adjust in the cart

Would you like me to implement this combined approach?

---

```
  def handle_event("add_product", %{"product-id" => product_id} = params, socket) do
    product =
      Enum.find(socket.assigns.products, &(&1.id == product_id)) ||
        Enum.find(socket.assigns.popular_products, &(&1.id == product_id))

    quantity = parse_quantity(params["quantity"])

    cond do
      # If 5+ button clicked, show quantity modal
      params["custom"] == "true" ->
        {:noreply,
         socket
         |> assign(:show_quantity_modal, true)
         |> assign(:quantity_product, product)}

      # If product has unit amounts, show unit modal
      product && product.unit ->
        {:noreply,
         socket
         |> assign(:show_unit_modal, true)
         |> assign(:selected_product, product)
         |> assign(:pending_quantity, quantity)}

      # Otherwise add directly
      true ->
        add_multiple_items_to_order(socket, product_id, nil, quantity)
    end
  end oldString:  @impl true
  def handle_event("add_product", %{"product-id" => product_id}, socket) do
    product =
      Enum.find(socket.assigns.products, &(&1.id == product_id)) ||
        Enum.find(socket.assigns.popular_products, &(&1.id == product_id))

    if product && product.unit do
      # Show modal for unit amount selection
      {:noreply,
       socket
       |> assign(:show_unit_modal, true)
       |> assign(:selected_product, product)}
    else
      # Add directly without unit amount
      add_item_to_order(socket, product_id, nil)
    end
  end] map[explanation:Update quick_add_unit_amount to handle pending quantity filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pos_live/order_management.ex newString:  @impl true
  def handle_event("quick_add_unit_amount", %{"unit_amount" => unit_amount}, socket) do
    product_id = socket.assigns.selected_product.id
    quantity = socket.assigns[:pending_quantity] || 1

    socket =
      socket
      |> assign(:show_unit_modal, false)
      |> assign(:selected_product, nil)
      |> assign(:pending_quantity, nil)

    add_multiple_items_to_order(socket, product_id, unit_amount, quantity)
  end oldString:  @impl true

  def handle_event("confirm_unit_amount", %{"unit_amount" => unit_amount}, socket) do
    product_id = socket.assigns.selected_product.id] map[explanation:Add new event handlers for quantity modal and cart adjustments filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pos_live/order_management.ex newString:  @impl true
  def handle_event("cancel_unit_modal", _params, socket) do
    {:noreply,
     socket
     |> assign(:show_unit_modal, false)
     |> assign(:selected_product, nil)
     |> assign(:pending_quantity, nil)}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("show_custom_quantity", %{"product-id" => product_id}, socket) do
    product =
      Enum.find(socket.assigns.products, &(&1.id == product_id)) ||
        Enum.find(socket.assigns.popular_products, &(&1.id == product_id))

    {:noreply,
     socket
     |> assign(:show_quantity_modal, true)
     |> assign(:quantity_product, product)}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("cancel_quantity_modal", _params, socket) do
    {:noreply,
     socket
     |> assign(:show_quantity_modal, false)
     |> assign(:quantity_product, nil)}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("add_with_quantity", %{"quantity" => quantity_str}, socket) do
    quantity = parse_quantity(quantity_str)
    product = socket.assigns.quantity_product

    socket =
      socket
      |> assign(:show_quantity_modal, false)
      |> assign(:quantity_product, nil)

    if product && product.unit do
      {:noreply,
       socket
       |> assign(:show_unit_modal, true)
       |> assign(:selected_product, product)
       |> assign(:pending_quantity, quantity)}
    else
      add_multiple_items_to_order(socket, product.id, nil, quantity)
    end
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("increase_quantity", %{"item-id" => item_id}, socket) do
    order_item = Enum.find(socket.assigns.order.order_items, &(&1.id == item_id))

    if order_item do
      new_quantity = Decimal.add(order_item.quantity, 1)
      {:ok, _} = Sales.update_order_item(order_item, %{quantity: new_quantity})
      {:ok, _order} = Sales.recalculate_order_total(socket.assigns.order)
      {:noreply, load_order(socket)}
    else
      {:noreply, socket}
    end
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("decrease_quantity", %{"item-id" => item_id}, socket) do
    order_item = Enum.find(socket.assigns.order.order_items, &(&1.id == item_id))

    if order_item do
      new_quantity = Decimal.sub(order_item.quantity, 1)

      if Decimal.compare(new_quantity, 0) == :gt do
        {:ok, _} = Sales.update_order_item(order_item, %{quantity: new_quantity})
        {:ok, _order} = Sales.recalculate_order_total(socket.assigns.order)
        {:noreply, load_order(socket)}
      else
        # If quantity would be 0 or less, show delete confirmation
        {:noreply,
         socket
         |> assign(:show_delete_confirm, true)
         |> assign(:item_to_delete, order_item)}
      end
    else
      {:noreply, socket}
    end
  end oldString:  @impl true
  def handle_event("cancel_unit_modal", _params, socket) do
    {:noreply,
     socket
     |> assign(:show_unit_modal, false)
     |> assign(:selected_product, nil)}
  end] map[explanation:Add helper function to parse quantity and add multiple items filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pos_live/order_management.ex newString:  defp parse_decimal(""), do: Decimal.new("0")
  defp parse_decimal(nil), do: Decimal.new("0")

  defp parse_decimal(value) when is_binary(value) do
    case Decimal.parse(value) do
      {amount, _} -> amount
      :error -> Decimal.new("0")
    end
  end

  defp parse_decimal(_), do: Decimal.new("0")

  defp parse_quantity(nil), do: 1
  defp parse_quantity(""), do: 1

  defp parse_quantity(value) when is_binary(value) do
    case Integer.parse(value) do
      {qty, _} when qty > 0 -> qty
      _ -> 1
    end
  end

  defp parse_quantity(value) when is_integer(value) and value > 0, do: value
  defp parse_quantity(_), do: 1

  defp add_multiple_items_to_order(socket, product_id, unit_amount, quantity) do
    # Add items one by one (could be optimized with bulk insert later)
    results =
      Enum.reduce(1..quantity, {:ok, socket}, fn _i, {:ok, acc_socket} ->
        add_item_to_order(acc_socket, product_id, unit_amount)
        |> then(fn {:noreply, updated_socket} -> {:ok, updated_socket} end)
      end)

    case results do
      {:ok, updated_socket} -> {:noreply, updated_socket}
      error -> error
    end
  end oldString:  defp parse_decimal(""), do: Decimal.new("0")
  defp parse_decimal(nil), do: Decimal.new("0")

  defp parse_decimal(value) when is_binary(value) do
    case Decimal.parse(value) do
      {amount, _} -> amount
      :error -> Decimal.new("0")
    end
  end

  defp parse_decimal(_), do: Decimal.new("0")]]
```

```
[map[explanation:Update popular products card with quantity buttons filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pos_live/order_management.html.heex newString:            <%= if is_nil(@selected_category_id) do %>
              <!-- Show Popular Products -->
              <div
                :for={product <- @popular_products}
                class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-200 p-4 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-tertiary-500"
              >
                <div class="flex items-center gap-4 mb-3">
                  <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
                    <h3 class="text-base font-bold text-slate-900 mb-1 truncate">
                      {product.name}
                    </h3>
                    <p :if={product.category} class="text-xs text-slate-500 mb-1 truncate">
                      {product.category.name}
                    </p>
                    <%= if product.pricing_info do %>
                      <p class="text-base font-bold text-success-dark">
                        <%= case product.pricing_info.type do %>
                          <% :single -> %>
                            {format_currency(product.pricing_info.price)}
                          <% :tiers -> %>
                            Multiple prices
                          <% :none -> %>
                            —
                        <% end %>
                      </p>
                    <% end %>
                    <span :if={product.unit} class="text-xs text-slate-600">
                      per {product.unit}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Quick Quantity Selector -->
                <div class="grid grid-cols-5 gap-2">
                  <button
                    :for={qty <- [1, 2, 3, 4]}
                    phx-click="add_product"
                    phx-value-product-id={product.id}
                    phx-value-quantity={qty}
                    class="bg-tertiary-600 hover:bg-tertiary-700 text-white font-bold py-3 rounded-lg active:scale-95 transition-all"
                  >
                    {qty}×
                  </button>
                  <button
                    phx-click="show_custom_quantity"
                    phx-value-product-id={product.id}
                    class="bg-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-700 text-white font-bold py-3 rounded-lg active:scale-95 transition-all"
                  >
                    5+
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div> oldString:            <%= if is_nil(@selected_category_id) do %>
              <!-- Show Popular Products -->
              <button
                :for={product <- @popular_products}
                phx-click="add_product"
                phx-value-product-id={product.id}
                class={[
                  "bg-white rounded-xl shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-200",
                  "p-4 active:scale-95 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-tertiary-500",
                  "flex items-center gap-4 text-left"

                <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <h3 class="text-base font-bold text-slate-900 mb-1 truncate">
                    {product.name}
                  </h3>
                  <p :if={product.category} class="text-xs text-slate-500 mb-1 truncate">
                    {product.category.name}
                  </p>
                  <%= if product.pricing_info do %>
                    <p class="text-base font-bold text-success-dark">
                      <%= case product.pricing_info.type do %>
                        <% :single -> %>
                          {format_currency(product.pricing_info.price)}
                        <% :tiers -> %>
                          Multiple prices
                        <% :none -> %>
                          —
                      <% end %>
                    </p>
                  <% end %>
                  <span :if={product.unit} class="text-xs text-slate-600">
                    per {product.unit}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <.icon name="hero-plus-circle" class="w-10 h-10 text-tertiary-600 flex-shrink-0" />
              </button>] map[explanation:Update category products card with quantity buttons filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pos_live/order_management.html.heex newString:            <% else %>

                :for={product <- filter_products(@products, @selected_category_id)}

              >
                <div class="flex items-center gap-4 mb-3">
                  <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
                    <h3 class="text-base font-bold text-slate-900 mb-1 truncate">
                      {product.name}

                    <% end %>
                    <span :if={product.unit} class="text-xs text-slate-600">
                      per {product.unit}

                  </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Quick Quantity Selector -->
                <div class="grid grid-cols-5 gap-2">
                  <button
                    :for={qty <- [1, 2, 3, 4]}
                    phx-click="add_product"
                    phx-value-product-id={product.id}
                    phx-value-quantity={qty}
```

```
<!-- Custom Quantity Modal -->
    <div
      :if={@show_quantity_modal && @quantity_product}
      class="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 flex items-center justify-center z-50"
      phx-click="cancel_quantity_modal"
    >
      <div
        class="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-2xl p-8 max-w-md w-full mx-4"
        phx-click={JS.exec("phx:stop-propagation")}
      >
        <h2 class="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-2">
          {@quantity_product.name}
        </h2>
        <p class="text-lg text-slate-600 mb-6">
          How many would you like to add?
        </p>
        
        <form phx-submit="add_with_quantity">
          <div class="mb-6">
            <label class="block text-sm font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-2">
              Quantity
            </label>
            <input
              type="number"
              name="quantity"
              min="1"
              max="99"
              value="5"
              autofocus
              class="w-full px-6 py-4 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-xl focus:border-tertiary-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-tertiary-200 transition-all text-2xl font-bold text-center"
            />
          </div>
          
          <div class="space-y-3">
            <button
              type="submit"
              class="w-full bg-success hover:bg-success-dark text-white font-bold py-5 px-6 rounded-2xl text-xl active:scale-95 transition-all shadow-lg"
            >
              Add to Order
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              phx-click="cancel_quantity_modal"
              class="w-full bg-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-300 text-slate-900 font-bold py-4 px-6 rounded-2xl text-lg active:scale-95 transition-all"
            >
              Cancel
            </button>
          </div>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- Success Toast -->
    <div
      :if={@show_success}
      phx-click="hide_success"
      class="fixed top-20 right-6 bg-success text-white px-6 py-4 rounded-xl shadow-2xl animate-bounce-in z-50"
    >
      <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
        <.icon name="hero-check-circle" class="w-6 h-6" />
        <span class="font-semibold text-lg">Item added!</span>
      </div>
    </div>
```

```
  @doc \"\"\"\n  Deletes an order item (soft delete).\n  \"\"\"\n  def delete_order_item(%OrderItem{} = order_item) do\n    order_item\n    |> Ecto.Changeset.change(deleted_at: DateTime.utc_now() |> DateTime.truncate(:second))\n    |> Repo.update()\n  end\n\n  @doc \"\"\"\n  Updates an order item and recalculates the subtotal.\n  \"\"\"\n  def update_order_item(%OrderItem{} = order_item, attrs) do\n    changeset = OrderItem.changeset(order_item, attrs)\n    \n    # If quantity changed, recalculate subtotal\n    changeset = \n      if Ecto.Changeset.changed?(changeset, :quantity) do\n        quantity = Ecto.Changeset.get_field(changeset, :quantity)\n        unit_price = Ecto.Changeset.get_field(changeset, :unit_price)\n        subtotal = Decimal.mult(Decimal.new(quantity), unit_price)\n        Ecto.Changeset.put_change(changeset, :subtotal, subtotal)\n      else\n        changeset\n      end\n    \n    Repo.update(changeset)\n  end", "oldString">  @doc \"\"\"\n  Deletes an order item (soft delete).\n  \"\"\"\n  def delete_order_item(%OrderItem{} = order_item) do\n    order_item\n    |> Ecto.Changeset.change(deleted_at: DateTime.utc_now() |> DateTime.truncate(:second))\n    |> Repo.update()\n  end"}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- filePath: `/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout/sales.ex`
- newString:

```
  @doc """
  Deletes an order item (soft delete).
  """
  def delete_order_item(%OrderItem{} = order_item) do
    order_item
    |> Ecto.Changeset.change(deleted_at: DateTime.utc_now() |> DateTime.truncate(:second))
    |> Repo.update()
  end

  @doc """
  Updates an order item and recalculates the subtotal.
  """
  def update_order_item(%OrderItem{} = order_item, attrs) do
    changeset = OrderItem.changeset(order_item, attrs)
    
    # If quantity changed, recalculate subtotal
    changeset = 
      if Ecto.Changeset.changed?(changeset, :quantity) do
        quantity = Ecto.Changeset.get_field(changeset, :quantity)
        unit_price = Ecto.Changeset.get_field(changeset, :unit_price)
        subtotal = Decimal.mult(Decimal.new(quantity), unit_price)
        Ecto.Changeset.put_change(changeset, :subtotal, subtotal)
      else
        changeset
      end
    
    Repo.update(changeset)
  end

  @doc """
```

- oldString:

```

  """
  def delete_order_item(%OrderItem{} = order_item) do

    |> Repo.update()
  end

  @doc """
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- filePath: `/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pos_live/order_management.ex`
- newString:

```
  @impl true
  def handle_event("confirm_unit_amount", %{"unit_amount" => unit_amount}, socket) do
    product_id = socket.assigns.selected_product.id
    quantity = socket.assigns[:pending_quantity] || 1

    socket =
      socket
      |> assign(:show_unit_modal, false)
      |> assign(:selected_product, nil)
      |> assign(:pending_quantity, nil)

    add_multiple_items_to_order(socket, product_id, unit_amount, quantity)
  end
```

```
[map[explanation:Remove increase_quantity and decrease_quantity event handlers filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pos_live/order_management.ex newString:  @impl true
  def handle_event("add_with_quantity", %{"quantity" => quantity_str}, socket) do
    quantity = parse_quantity(quantity_str)
    product = socket.assigns.quantity_product

    socket =
      socket
      |> assign(:show_quantity_modal, false)
      |> assign(:quantity_product, nil)

    if product && product.unit do
      {:noreply,
       socket
       |> assign(:show_unit_modal, true)
       |> assign(:selected_product, product)
       |> assign(:pending_quantity, quantity)}
    else
      add_multiple_items_to_order(socket, product.id, nil, quantity)
    end
  end oldString:  @impl true
  def handle_event("add_with_quantity", %{"quantity" => quantity_str}, socket) do
    quantity = parse_quantity(quantity_str)
    product = socket.assigns.quantity_product

    socket =
      socket
      |> assign(:show_quantity_modal, false)
      |> assign(:quantity_product, nil)

    if product && product.unit do
      {:noreply,
       socket
       |> assign(:show_unit_modal, true)
       |> assign(:selected_product, product)
       |> assign(:pending_quantity, quantity)}
    else
      add_multiple_items_to_order(socket, product.id, nil, quantity)
    end
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("increase_quantity", %{"item-id" => item_id}, socket) do
    order_item = Enum.find(socket.assigns.order.order_items, &(&1.id == item_id))

    if order_item do
      new_quantity = Decimal.add(order_item.quantity, 1)
      {:ok, _} = Sales.update_order_item(order_item, %{quantity: new_quantity})
      {:ok, _order} = Sales.recalculate_order_total(socket.assigns.order)
      {:noreply, load_order(socket)}
    else
      {:noreply, socket}
    end
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("decrease_quantity", %{"item-id" => item_id}, socket) do
    order_item = Enum.find(socket.assigns.order.order_items, &(&1.id == item_id))

    if order_item do
      new_quantity = Decimal.sub(order_item.quantity, 1)

      if Decimal.compare(new_quantity, 0) == :gt do
        {:ok, _} = Sales.update_order_item(order_item, %{quantity: new_quantity})
        {:ok, _order} = Sales.recalculate_order_total(socket.assigns.order)
        {:noreply, load_order(socket)}
      else
        # If quantity would be 0 or less, show delete confirmation
        {:noreply,
         socket
         |> assign(:show_delete_confirm, true)
         |> assign(:item_to_delete, order_item)}
      end
    else
      {:noreply, socket}
    end
  end] map[explanation:Revert single cart item display to original without quantity controls filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pos_live/order_management.html.heex newString:                    <div class="swipe-content relative bg-slate-50 p-4">

                            {group.product.name}
                          </h3>
                          <p class="text-sm text-slate-600">
                            <%= if group.unit_amount do %>
                              {Decimal.round(group.unit_amount, 2)}{group.unit} × {Decimal.round(
                                group.total_quantity,
                                2
                              )}
                            <% else %>
                              Qty: {Decimal.round(group.total_quantity, 2)}
                            <% end %>
                          </p>
                          <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">

                        </div>
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                          <p class="font-bold text-slate-900">
                            {format_currency(group.total_price)}
                          </p>

                            phx-click="delete_item"
                            phx-value-item-id={hd(group.items).id}
                            class="text-error hover:text-error-dark active:scale-95"
                          >
                            <.icon name="hero-x-mark" class="w-5 h-5" />
                          </button>
```

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

The user wants to remove the +/- quantity controls from the cart items list. They only want to keep the quick quantity buttons (1-4) and the 5+ modal on the product cards, but not the ability to adjust quantities after items are added to the cart.

I need to:
1. Remove the increase_quantity and decrease_quantity event handlers from the LiveView
2. Remove the +/- buttons from the cart items in the template
3. Optionally, I could remove the update_order_item function from Sales context, but it might be useful for other purposes, so I'll leave it

Let me remove:
- The increase_quantity and decrease_quantity event handlers
- The +/- buttons from both single items and expanded items in the cart
- Revert the cart item display to show quantity as before
